_comment: Cloud Service Configuration / 云端服务配置
_usage: Fill in the URLs below to enable cloud mode (login, payment, skill market, etc). Leave empty for local-only mode (API Key required).
_usage_zh: 填入下方地址启用云端模式（登录、支付、技能市场等）。留空则为本地模式（需自备 API Key）。

_notes.service_base_url: Main cloud service URL for chat relay, Composio proxy, skill market, balance, etc.
_notes.payment_base_url: Payment/subscription backend URL. Defaults to service_base_url if empty.
